summary: End-to-end testing completed successfully for Girish Children Clinic landing page. 9/9 backend pytest cases passed; all frontend flows verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Appointment form POST→201→toast→reset loop works end to end; no MongoDB _id leaks.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but Appointment response_model returns datetime — working because create_appointment returns the in-memory object; list endpoint re-parses the string. Consider storing native BSON datetime for consistency.
Contact.jsx sends preferred_time/message as null (not omitted). Pydantic accepts None so it works; fine.
No rate-limiting/abuse protection on public POST /api/appointments — consider basic throttling or captcha for production.
Hero image is a hardcoded CDN URL in Hero.jsx; acceptable for placeholder per PRD.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed appointments in the appointments collection via pytest and the Playwright valid-submit flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data-testid selectors align with Contact.jsx/Hero.jsx/Header.jsx/MobileStickyBar.jsx. Sonner toasts render as [data-sonner-toast]/li[role='status']. Mobile sticky bar uses md:hidden, which works correctly. Empty-form validation requires removing 'required' attrs to reach the JS-level validation (native browser tooltip otherwise) — test harness handles that.
